title: ranunculus micranthus var. delitescens
intro: Ranunculus micranthus var. delitescens, also known as Delicate Ranunculus or Small Buttercup, is a rare and ephemeral variety of flowering plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ranunculus micranthus var. delitescens include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a salve or ointment by infusing the flowers and leaves in a carrier oil, which can be applied topically to affected areas.
